task: Settlement deduction cap — net floor (50% gross + absolute cents) with all-or-nothing roll-over of pending deductions at settlement close.

decisions.C-1-A: Per-field independent coalesce (driver.pct + company.cents resolve independently)
decisions.C-2-A: Spec literal — available = gross - floor only (abandonment chargebacks not subtracted)
decisions.C-3-A: CHECK constraints: pct BETWEEN 0 AND 100, cents >= 0
decisions.C-4-A: No GRANT changes — existing table grants on org.companies (0013) and mdata.drivers (0008) cover new columns

resolve_order: per-driver override -> company default -> env SETTLEMENT_MIN_NET_PCT
note: First production consumer of driver_finance.driver_settlement_deductions.applied_to_settlement_id. Deductions over the cap stay unapplied (applied_to_settlement_id IS NULL) and auto roll over to the next settlement.
